title: Vulniq Configuration
description: Schema for vulniq.config.json. All fields are optional — Vulniq runs with zero config using the defaults in scripts/config.mjs.

severity.description: Severity level shared across checks, custom patterns, and the threshold.

autonomyLevel.description: APTS Graduated Autonomy level (APTS-AL-001..004). L1=assisted, L2=supervised, L3=high (Vulniq default), L4=full.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for inline editor validation.

autonomyLevel.description: Declared autonomy level for the engagement. Default 'L3'.

autonomyLevelOverride.description: Per-run override that demotes autonomy (e.g. 'L2' to require per-finding approval). Default null.

stepTimeoutMs.description: Per-step soft timeout in milliseconds. Exceeding emits `step.timeout` and halts the scan. Default 300000.

apts.description: APTS compliance declaration. Set enabled:false to skip APTS pre-flight and conformance generation.

enabled.description: Whether APTS pre-flight and Conformance Claim generation run. Default true.

tier.description: APTS tier targeted by this engagement. Default 'foundation'.

checks.description: Enable/disable individual check categories and override their default severity.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files to skip. Overrides defaults if provided (not merged).

include.description: If non-empty, ONLY scan matching files. Default [].

severityThreshold.description: Minimum severity to include in the report. Default 'low'.

maxFindings.description: Stop reporting after this many findings. Default 500.

reportTitle.description: Custom title for the generated report. Default 'Security Audit'.

fileGlob.description: File glob that bounds the search scope.

suppressions.description: Suppression rules for known false positives. Merged with .vulniq/suppressions.json at scan time.

files.description: File globs — suppress all findings in matching files.
